CVE-2024-3400.description: A command injection vulnerability in Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS GlobalProtect gateway and portal may allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary code.

CVE-2023-34362.description: A SQL injection vulnerability in Progress MOVEit Transfer may allow unauthenticated attackers to gain unauthorized access to MOVEit Transfer databases.

CVE-2021-44228.description: Apache Log4j2 JNDI features do not protect against attacker-controlled LDAP and other JNDI related endpoints, allowing remote code execution.
